name: io.github.miller-joe/comfyui-mcp
description: MCP server for ComfyUI: text-to-image, variations, img2img refine, upscale, image proxy.

environmentVariables.name: COMFYUI_URL
environmentVariables.description: ComfyUI HTTP URL used internally by this server. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8188

environmentVariables.name: COMFYUI_PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Externally-reachable ComfyUI URL used in image URLs returned to clients. Set when the internal URL isn't reachable from MCP clients (common with Docker networks).
